Even more outrageously, the tone in the latter half of the license suddenly shifts, starting to 'sell clothing, sell textiles, and even do environmental engineering construction.' Utilizing the 4 million paid-in capital, the boss created a shell that can do anything: flipping industrial control equipment and electromechanical hardware with the left hand, reselling clothing and textiles with the right, and even using connections to secure landscape engineering contracts to subcontract and earn the margin. The official 'Electronic Device Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most outrageous misinterpretation of this universal commercial street middleman.
